name: Crockpot Grains, Etc.
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces kidney beans, cooked and drained
16 ounces canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a crockpot.
2. Place grains (millet, barley, brown rice) in the pot last.
3. Add water from reserved canned tomatoes to make a total of 2 1/2 cups.
4. Stir the mixture into the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 hours.
6. Before serving, stir the contents well.
